items.title: Commit Chronicles—Your Obsession Leaves a Trail. Mine Gives It a Plot.
items.summary: Snowflake fetches a repo's commit history, finds the one story in it with plain SQL, and narrates that single thread with Cortex. Six storylines. One card.
